title: Replanter
description: Simple mod that replants crops while harvesting
body: # replanter A relatively small and simple mod made with Kotlin and modstitch for automatically replanting crops after harvesting. ## Modpack If you wish to use this mod in a modpack, I ask that you host the modpack on Modrinth. Any other questions? Feel free to reach out via Github Issues or email (imide@imide.xyz) ## Credits Credits can be found at the [README.md.](https://github.com/imide/replanter) ## License This mod is licensed under the [GNU AGPLv3](https://choosealicense.com/licenses/agpl-3.0/)
